user_message: [AUTOMATION TRIGGER] Scheduled Calendar event with non-Microsoft external attendee detected initiated for Lucerne Publishing.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Laura Anderson <laura.anderson@lucernepubli.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-02 14:09 EST
Subject: URGENT: deployment blockers Issue at Lucerne Publishing

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about deployment blockers. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

---
From: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
To: Laura Anderson <laura.anderson@lucernepubli.com>
Date: 2024-01-18 16:40 EST
Subject: Follow-up: deployment blockers Review

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with deployment blockers. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

Meeting: deployment blockers Discussion - Lucerne Publishing
Date: 2024-01-22
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Laura Anderson (Lucerne Publishing), Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft), Michelle (Lucerne Publishing)

[00:02:00] Laura Anderson (Lucerne Publishing): Good morning. I wanted to follow up on deployment blockers from our last session.

[00:07:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): On the deployment blockers front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around cost optimization.

[00:09:00] Laura Anderson (Lucerne Publishing): On the deployment blockers front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around partner engagement.

[00:12:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is stakeholder alignment.

[00:16:00] Michelle (Lucerne Publishing): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is stakeholder alignment.

[00:20:00] Michelle (Lucerne Publishing): On the deployment blockers front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around vendor dependencies.

[00:23:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): On the deployment blockers front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around resource allocation.

[00:26:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): Our architect reviewed this and has concerns about timeline constraints. Can we address those?

[00:31:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is security compliance.

[00:36:00] Laura Anderson (Lucerne Publishing): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is stakeholder alignment.

[00:38:00] Michelle (Lucerne Publishing): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is security compliance.
